autoDJ.uncheckedHint: Les dossiers non cochés seront ignorés dans toutes les requêtes de la base (y compris Auto DJ)
autoDJ.heroDescription: Pick a corner of your library and let it run.
autoDJ.sourcesHint: Tracks come from the libraries you select. Click to toggle.
autoDJ.similarHint: Bias picks toward artists Last.fm says are similar to the current song.
autoDJ.similarHintNoKey: No Last.fm API key configured on the server.
autoDJ.bpmContinuityHint: Prefer picks within a tempo window of the current song. Honours octave equivalence (half / double tempo).
autoDJ.harmonicMixingHint: Prefer picks in keys that mix well with the current song (Camelot wheel neighbours).
autoDJ.keywordFilterHint: Skip picks whose title, artist, album, or filepath contains any of these words.
autoDJ.keywordFilterPlaceholder: Add a word and press Enter…
autoDJ.genreFilterHint: Whitelist plays only matching tracks; blacklist skips them.
autoDJ.genreInputLabel: Add a genre to the filter
autoDJ.genreHintEmpty: No genre tags found in your library.
autoDJ.genreHintAuth: Please log in to see your genres.
autoDJ.genreHintError: Couldn't load genres. Reload the panel to retry.
autoDJ.genreNoMatches: No tracks match the current genre filter. Adjust the list, switch mode, or turn it off.
autoDJ.similarInfoBodyMore: Picked something close to {{source}}. Considered: {{candidates}} (+{{extra}} more).
autoDJ.statusOn: Auto DJ is on. The next song will be picked for you.
